"Your Support helps to transform lives. From education to health care, every contribution moves us one step closer"

— protect and love, care and support vulnerable people

Our Objectives

We have established clear, measurable goals that guide our work and ensure we create meaningful impact in the communities we serve.

Images

A glimpse into the real work happening on the ground and the lives being transformed.

Support This Program

Your contribution can help us expand our reach and create more lasting impact. Join us in making a difference in the lives of those who need it most.

MDHF

Mwinja Divine Help Foundation

Empowering refugees and host communities through sustainable livelihood programs and inclusive development initiatives.

“To protect and love, care and support vulnerable people”
